title: Night Club Girl
writer: Adele Comandini, Henry Blankfort, Dick Irving Hyland
actors: Vivian Austin, Edward Norris, Maxie Rosenbloom
plot: Two show-business wannabees get their big chance to show off their big-time act and talents in a nightclub,and bomb. Othet acts come on---endlessly---and do well, but the kids will be back.
